MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description for AweSun Remote Desktop.

Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: What's New in v16.5: Native macOS support for Intel and Apple Silicon chips; AI MCP workflow integration for system automation; upgraded Game Mode supporting up to 144FPS and 4:4:4 lossless color streaming; enhanced RSA/AES encryption; optimized unattended access, remote file transfer, and remote tech support workflows.

English.Keywords: remote desktop, remote access, hybrid work, 144fps remote gaming, remote control, Mac remote desktop, Apple Silicon, AI MCP, unattended access, remote support, IT operations, file transfer
English.Char_Desc_45: Secure Mac remote desktop for office and IT.
English.Char_Desc_80: Secure macOS remote desktop for office, support, gaming, and IT operations.
English.Char_Desc_250: AweSun Remote Desktop for macOS supports Intel and Apple Silicon devices, offering secure remote access, unattended control, remote tech support, 144FPS Game Mode, file transfer, and AI MCP automation workflows.
English.Char_Desc_450: AweSun Remote Desktop is a secure, fast, and cross-platform remote access tool for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android. The macOS version supports both Intel and Apple Silicon chips, enabling everyday office work, remote tech support, unattended access, 144FPS remote gaming, 4:4:4 lossless color streaming, remote file transfer, and AI MCP workflow integration.
English.Char_Desc_2000: AweSun Remote Desktop for macOS is a secure, high-performance remote access solution built for both Intel-based Macs and Apple Silicon devices. It helps office workers, hybrid teams, helpdesk technicians, developers, and IT administrators connect to remote computers from anywhere for daily work, troubleshooting, file transfer, remote assistance, and IT operations. As part of the AweSun cross-platform ecosystem, it connects smoothly with Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android devices. AweSun is designed for a practical Freemium experience, with a strong free tier for personal use and flexible deployment scenarios that reduce interruption risks during office work and support sessions. Security is built into the session lifecycle with 2048-bit RSA and 256-bit AES encryption, host-side permission control, privacy protection, and session visibility. For productivity, AweSun supports unattended access, multi-screen control, RDP, CMD/SSH, and remote file workflows. For gaming and creative work, Game Mode supports up to 144FPS ultra-high refresh rates and 4:4:4 lossless color streaming, helping deliver smoother game sessions, design review, CAD workflows, and pixel-sensitive visual tasks. AweSun also includes AI MCP workflow integration, allowing developers and advanced IT users to connect LLM-driven automation with remote desktop environments for routine system tasks and complex operations.
